goal: UR10 builtin stacking pick-place: pick cube from pedestal, stack ON TOP OF a stationary base cube. Validates raycast workaround composes with stacking destinations (drop on prim instead of into bin).
thoughts:
Stacking instead of bin-drop:
1) UR10 base + table + pedestal (with cube) same as CP-78.
2) BaseCube at world (0.5, -0.4, 0.775) — sits on table top. UR10 stacks Cube_1 on top.
3) destination_path = '/World/BaseCube' instead of '/World/Bin'.
4) builtin handler picks any prim as destination; bin-detection is for drop-test only.
5) drop_targets: use place_on_top_of helper to compute drop coords above BaseCube.
6) Test goal: cube_1 ends up at z=0.825 (BaseCube top + half cube) — on top of base.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/UR10", prim_type="Xform")
add_reference(prim_path="/World/UR10", reference_path="/mnt/shared_data/isaac-sim-assets-complete-5.0.0/Assets/Isaac/5.0/Collected_Robots/ur10.usd")
teleport_prim(prim_path="/World/UR10", position=[0, 0, 0.75])

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Pedestal", prim_type="Cube", position=[-0.5, 0.4, 0.875], scale=[0.06, 0.06, 0.075])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Pedestal", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", prim_type="Cube", position=[-0.5, 0.4, 0.975], size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", schema_name=api)
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=["/World/Cube_1"], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
apply_physics_material(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", material_name="rubber")

# Static base cube on table for stacking
create_prim(prim_path="/World/BaseCube", prim_type="Cube", position=[0.5, -0.4, 0.775], size=0.05)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/BaseCube", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/UR10",
    robot_family="ur10",
    target_source="builtin",
    source_paths=["/World/Cube_1"],
    destination_path="/World/BaseCube",
    drop_target=[0.5, -0.4, 0.825],
    end_effector_offset=[0.0, 0.0, 0.02],
)
extension_notes: CP-84 = CP-78 with destination as a static cube prim instead of a bin. Drop coordinates computed manually as 0.825 (BaseCube top 0.80 + half source cube 0.025).
failure_modes: BaseCube has no RigidBody — pure collider. Should hold static.
Drop precision: cube might land off-center on BaseCube and topple.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-05-08; form-gate ✓; function-gate ✗ (drop precision — cube lands at z=0.775 table top, ~0.2m short of BaseCube target). RmpFlow descent may not reach precise drop_target; transit-end-stuck pattern. cuRobo with planning_obstacles=[BaseCube] would be the proper fix.
